message:
fix(persist): preserve RDB AUX metadata with lossy UTF-8 instead of silently dropping

Previously, AUX fields (redis-ver, ctime, etc.) with non-UTF8 bytes were
silently discarded. This could mask version mismatches or corruption signals.
Now uses String::from_utf8_lossy to preserve the data with replacement chars.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
